results.rendered_html:
savikalpa (2. sa + vi˚) adj.
1〉 Verschiedenheit —, Mannichfaltigkeit zulassend, damit behaftet, differentiirt  VEDĀNTAS. (Allah.) No. 124 .  BĀLAB. 24 .
— 2〉 sammt den Zwischen-Kalpa  BHĀG. P. 2,10,46 .

results.rendered_html:
savikalpa, savikalpaka a.
1 Optional.
2 Doubtful.
3 Recognizing a distinction as that of subject and object, or of the knower and the known (opp. nirvikalpaka q. v.).
